name: GDELT
notes: Use for topic detection, clustering, geography hints, and media-attention bursts. Do not use as the sole basis for a final bet.
license_notes: Free/open platform; verify reuse terms per downstream workflow.

name: World Bank Indicators API
notes: Use for structural baselines and country comparisons.
license_notes: Open World Bank data; confirm per-series usage terms if redistributed.

name: ILOSTAT Bulk Download Facility
notes: Use the official bulk indicator CSV downloads for labour structure, participation, unemployment, sector dynamics, and informality.
license_notes: Public bulk download access exposed by ILOSTAT; verify per-dataset reuse terms if redistributed.

name: USGS Earthquake Feeds
notes: Use for precise hazard confirmation with timestamps and magnitude.
license_notes: Machine-readable feeds exposed publicly by USGS.

name: OpenStreetMap Overpass API
update_cadence: Near real time with some lag
notes: Use for infrastructure density, place context, proximity checks, and asset lookup.
license_notes: Read-only API over OSM data; respect OSM/instance usage expectations.

name: EIA API
coverage: Energy markets, electricity, fuels, and system data
notes: Use for energy system context and supply-demand stress.
license_notes: Free API, but requires an API key.
